nodes.name: YYZ Airport Arrival
nodes.description: name: YYZ Airport Arrival | time_block: 2:00 PM - 3:00 PM | description: Flight lands at Toronto Pearson International Airport. Long journey from overseas, feeling tired and jet-lagged. | travel_method: Flight | expected_cost: Included | highlights: International arrival, Customs and baggage

nodes.name: Harbourfront Stroll
nodes.description: name: Harbourfront Stroll | time_block: 5:00 PM - 6:30 PM | description: Easy, relaxing walk along the waterfront. Low-energy activity perfect for recovering from travel_method. Beautiful lake views and fresh air. | travel_method: Walk | expected_cost: Free | highlights: Lake Ontario views, Relaxing atmosphere, Outdoor fresh air

nodes.name: Client Kickoff Meeting
nodes.description: name: Client Kickoff Meeting | time_block: 9:00 AM - 12:00 PM | description: Formal business meeting at TD Tower with key stakeholders. High-pressure work presentation and strategy discussion. Professional corporate environment. | travel_method: Walk | expected_cost: Work | highlights: Work meeting, Client presentation, Corporate formal

nodes.name: Strategy Workshop
nodes.description: name: Strategy Workshop | time_block: 1:00 PM - 5:00 PM | description: Intensive afternoon workshop session with the team. Long work hours in conference room. Mentally draining but productive. | travel_method: Walk | expected_cost: Work | highlights: Work session, Team collaboration, Meeting room

nodes.name: Stakeholder Presentation
nodes.description: name: Stakeholder Presentation | time_block: 9:00 AM - 11:00 AM | description: Morning work session presenting quarterly results to stakeholders. High-pressure meeting requiring focus and preparation. | travel_method: Walk | expected_cost: Work | highlights: Work meeting, Business presentation

nodes.name: Art Gallery of Ontario
nodes.description: name: Art Gallery of Ontario | time_block: 12:00 PM - 2:00 PM | description: World-class art museum with Canadian and international collections. Indoor cultural experience in Frank Gehry-designed building. Quiet and contemplative atmosphere. | travel_method: Walk | expected_cost: CAD 25 | highlights: Indoor museum, Cultural experience, Art gallery

nodes.name: Full-Day Workshop
nodes.description: name: Full-Day Workshop | time_block: 9:00 AM - 4:00 PM | description: Intensive all-day work workshop with the entire team. Exhausting but productive session covering project roadmap and deliverables. | travel_method: Walk | expected_cost: Work | highlights: Work meeting, Full day session, Team workshop

nodes.name: Bloor Street Shopping
nodes.description: name: Bloor Street Shopping | time_block: 5:00 PM - 6:30 PM | description: Optional shopping trip along Bloor-Yorkville luxury district. High-end boutiques and designer stores. | travel_method: Walk | expected_cost: Variable | highlights: Luxury shopping, Optional activity

nodes.name: Client Check-in Call
nodes.description: name: Client Check-in Call | time_block: 11:00 AM - 12:00 PM | description: Remote video call with client to discuss project status. Light work commitment from hotel room. | travel_method: None | expected_cost: Work | highlights: Work call, Remote meeting

nodes.name: Email Catch-up Block
nodes.description: name: Email Catch-up Block | time_block: 2:00 PM - 3:00 PM | description: Dedicated time_block to respond to accumulated work emails. Optional but recommended to stay on top of inbox. | travel_method: None | expected_cost: Work | highlights: Work admin, Optional task

nodes.name: Networking Drinks
nodes.description: name: Networking Drinks | time_block: 6:00 PM - 7:30 PM | description: Casual drinks with industry contacts at a downtown bar. Work-adjacent networking opportunity. | travel_method: Walk | expected_cost: CAD 40-60 | highlights: Work networking, Professional socializing

nodes.name: Toronto Islands Ferry and Bike Ride
nodes.description: name: Toronto Islands Ferry and Bike Ride | time_block: 10:30 AM - 1:30 PM | description: Ferry ride to Toronto Islands followed by bike rental and exploration. Outdoor nature activity with beaches, gardens, and stunning skyline views. Perfect for families and kids. | travel_method: Walk and Ferry | expected_cost: CAD 35 | highlights: Outdoor nature, Kid-friendly family activity, Bike riding, Beach access

nodes.name: Ripley's Aquarium
nodes.description: name: Ripley's Aquarium | time_block: 3:30 PM - 5:30 PM | description: World-class aquarium with underwater tunnel and interactive exhibits. Indoor family attraction perfect for kids. Sharks, jellyfish, and touch tanks. | travel_method: Ferry and Walk | expected_cost: CAD 45 | highlights: Indoor attraction, Kid-friendly family activity, Marine life

nodes.name: Royal Ontario Museum
nodes.description: name: Royal Ontario Museum | time_block: 10:00 AM - 12:30 PM | description: World-renowned museum showcasing art, culture, and natural history. Indoor cultural experience with dinosaurs, gems, and world cultures exhibits. | travel_method: Walk | expected_cost: CAD 23 | highlights: Indoor museum, Cultural experience, Natural history

nodes.name: Distillery District Walk
nodes.description: name: Distillery District Walk | time_block: 3:00 PM - 5:00 PM | description: Historic pedestrian village with cobblestone streets, artisan shops, and galleries. Outdoor walking experience through restored Victorian industrial architecture. | travel_method: Public Transit | expected_cost: Free | highlights: Outdoor walking tour, Historic architecture, Artisan shops

nodes.name: Niagara Falls Day Trip
nodes.description: name: Niagara Falls Day Trip | time_block: 8:00 AM - 6:00 PM | description: Full-day excursion to Niagara Falls. Includes bus transportation, Hornblower boat ride, and time_block to explore the falls. Outdoor scenic adventure, weather dependent. | travel_method: Tour Bus | expected_cost: CAD 150 | highlights: Outdoor nature, Scenic waterfall, Full day trip, Iconic destination

nodes.name: Eaton Centre Shopping
nodes.description: name: Eaton Centre Shopping | time_block: 11:00 AM - 1:30 PM | description: Major downtown shopping mall with hundreds of stores. Indoor shopping for souvenirs, clothing, and gifts. Climate-controlled and convenient. | travel_method: Public Transit | expected_cost: Variable | highlights: Indoor shopping mall, Souvenir shopping, Major retailers

nodes.name: Queen Street West Boutiques
nodes.description: name: Queen Street West Boutiques | time_block: 3:00 PM - 5:00 PM | description: Eclectic shopping district with independent boutiques, vintage stores, and Canadian designers. Outdoor walking and browsing experience. | travel_method: Walk | expected_cost: Variable | highlights: Boutique shopping, Independent stores, Outdoor walking

nodes.name: CN Tower EdgeWalk
nodes.description: name: CN Tower EdgeWalk | time_block: 10:00 AM - 12:00 PM | description: Thrilling hands-free walk around the outside of CN Tower at 356 meters. Unique bucket-list experience with stunning views. Memorable and unforgettable adventure. | travel_method: Taxi | expected_cost: CAD 225 | highlights: Unique memorable experience, Bucket list activity, Thrilling adventure

nodes.name: Airport Snack Stop
nodes.description: name: Airport Snack Stop | time_block: 4:00 PM - 4:30 PM | description: Generic airport food and coffee before boarding. Forgettable but necessary. Nothing special about airport dining. | travel_method: Walk | expected_cost: CAD 20 | highlights: Generic airport food, Forgettable quick bite

nodes.name: YYZ Departure
nodes.description: name: YYZ Departure | time_block: 6:00 PM | description: Flight departure from Toronto Pearson International Airport. End of trip. | travel_method: Flight | expected_cost: Included | highlights: Departure flight, End of trip
